attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.TAA_SSOT_SEQ, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.PRODUCT_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.DF_ORG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.TAA_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.TAA_NO_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.TAA_YES_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.NEXT_REVIEW_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.ORDERABILITY_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.TAA_EXCEPTION_PROCESS_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.TAA_ENABLEMENT_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.TAA_EOL_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.TEP_LEAD_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.TAA_MANUAL_OVERRIDE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA,
 (
 select PRODUCT_ID ,DF_ORG ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA
 minus
 select PRODUCT_ID ,DF_ORG ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PRODUCT_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.PRODUCT_ID and ACM.DF_ORG=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.DF_ORG and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_BUY_AMERICA.REFRESH_DATETIME
